If the total sum is odd, the answer is immediately false. Why?
This problem reduces to: can we find a subset that sums to totalSum / 2?
This is the classic 0/1 knapsack problem. Use a boolean dp array where dp[j] means sum j is achievable.
Iterate through each number and update dp from right to left: dp[j] = dp[j] || dp[j - num]. This ensures each number is used at most once.
